RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0035 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Liam Ito Date of Birth: 18/05/1987 SSN (tokenized): TKN-800630 Annual Income: $155,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $11,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN69445AL Honda Civic 2022 EV New 54,000 VIN26663AL Kia Civic 2022 ICE CPO 52,000 Authorized Signature: Liam Ito
